/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkespcl_utils.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkespcl_utils.so CMakeFiles/fawkespcl_utils.dir/pcl_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkespcl_utils.dir/pointcloud_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkespcl_utils.dir/storage_adapter.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkestf.so -L/usr/lib64 -lpcl_common -ltolua++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libTransformInterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so -L/usr/lib64 -llua-5.1 -ldl -lmagic -ldaemon /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lstdc++ -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lm -ltolua++
